text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Why're you phrasin' it as a question?
choice_data_list:
Because you didn't really look excited about
it...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...That kinda stuff's been happenin' to me a lot
lately.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, she's been getting tons more
interview requests since the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur's battle against a more obvious
difficulty has led to increased exposure, and that
might be helping her fans feel more comfortable
giving her their open support.
choice_data_list: It's proof that people recognize your real worth.
It's proof that people recognize your real worth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It does feel a little late coming, but perhaps her
ambitions are close to being realized.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Why am I gettin' this weird premonition that
everything'll change after this race? Is this what
they call a gut feeling?)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Whatever it is, it feels weird for some reason.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Haven't I always wanted people to recognize my
worth?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(...No, I can't think about that now. These aren't
opponents I can beat with my head in the clouds.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I can think all I want after I win.
